title: Study in China
description: Experience world-class American education in China at Duke Kunshan University. Explore undergraduate programs, global learning opportunities, and vibrant campus life. Apply now for a transformative cross-cultural academic journey.
text:
Study in China
Why You Should Study In China
One of the most critical decisions in your life is choosing where to pursue your degree. While studying abroad offers you the opportunity for adventure, interacting with different cultures and opening your mind, the quality of your academic education must not be overlooked.
Choosing the right university and the right country for your studies will transform your life and ultimately have an impact on your career opportunities.
China is competing with the most prestigious study destinations around the globe and is becoming a top choice for international students.
The Chinese Education System Today
In 2012, the Chinese government embarked on an effort to make the country an international hub for education. The announced goal was to enroll 500,000 international students by 2020 and to become a top draw for talented students at all levels of Post-secondaryeducation.
The move is paying off. The 2018 Global Talent Mobility and Wealth Management report testifies to the country’s impressive progress toward its goal, predicting that China will be a major exchange hub for global talent by 2022.
Thanks to the government’s investment in education, China is already a top destination for students in Asia, while also proving increasingly attractive to students from other continents. Prestigious educational institutions, such as Duke Kunshan University, have taken this opportunity to establish campuses in major cities in China, creating state-of-the-art facilities to attract students from around the world.
The country’s rapid rise in popularity as an academic destination can be explained by several factors that make the decision to study in China a wise choice.
7 Reasons To Study In China
#1 High-Quality Education
China’s universities offer you a world-class education. Many Chinese universities are ranked among the world’s top institutions. Joint venture universities like Duke Kunshan combine modern and innovative academic programs with the prestige and tradition of storied institutions.
As the reputation and international presence of Chinese universities continues to grow, a degree from China will add increasing prestige to your CV, as well as facilitating career opportunities in China.
#2 Excellent Career Opportunities
China has a dynamic and robust economy. If you choose to study in China, you will experience firsthand the economic rise of this world power and have the opportunity to establish a strong network of contacts.
Last year more than 900,000 foreigners were employed in China, and the number of high-level foreign professionals requesting to work in the country is constantly increasing. Major corporations have their headquarters in Chinese cities, resulting in many interesting career opportunities for new graduates.
#3 Safe But Exciting Environment
Safety is a primary concern when moving to a foreign country. Chinese cities offer you the opportunity to study in a safe environment, as the country boasts an exceptionally low crime rate. Safety issues that may be of concern in European and American cities are not common in China.
Moreover, Chinese cities are modern, dynamic and well serviced by public transportation. You will find a vibrant nightlife, excellent activity choices and plenty of other entertainment opportunities.
#4 Affordability
Money is a constant worry for many students and their families, and studying abroad can be an extra strain on your finances. By studying in China, you can have the international learning experience you are looking for without breaking the bank.
How? The cost of living in China is considerably lower than in Europe, America, Japan and South Korea. Food, transportation and general day-to-day expenses are relatively cheap. If you choose China as your study destination, you will reap the benefits of a world-class education at a reasonable price.
#5 Scholarship Opportunities
In order to attract more international students, the Chinese government is increasing its efforts to offer scholarships to the brightest minds. Those who study in China have greater opportunities to receive a financial award, making a degree even more affordable.
#6 Cultural Immersion
More people speak Chinese than any other language in the world. Considering the fast-paced economic growth of the country and its position as the second-largest economy in the world, a spoken and written command of the Chinese language is a valuable asset for your career.
Not only will you be studying Chinese as part of your degree requirement, but you will also be immersed in the Chinese language outside of the classroom, giving you a leg up towards fluency. Moreover, you will learn the local culture, which will prove advantageous for working in a Chinese business environment.
#7 History And Modernity
China boasts 5,000 years of history. This impressive heritage of culture and tradition pervades every corner of the country. During breaks from your studies, you will have the opportunity to explore the country and visit some of the most remarkable historical sites in the world.
At the same time, Chinese cities are paragons of innovation and modernity where you can find cutting-edge architecture and advanced technology.
Living and studying in China will expand your horizons and your career opportunities—and you will certainly never get bored.
